ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "global_account_type" TEXT /* Type of the global account (e.g., Enterprise, Trial) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region associated with the account */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IaaS provider for the account */,
  "technical_key" TEXT /* Technical key associated with the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was last modified */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for account contact */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account manager assigned to the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Singapore, US East (VA)) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the regional characteristics */,
  "data_center" TEXT /* Name of the primary data center in the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the IaaS provider (e.g., Microsoft Azure, Amazon Web Services) */,
  "provider_description" TEXT /* Description of the provider's services */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email address for provider support */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for provider support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical key */,
  "technical_key" TEXT /* The technical key string for the IaaS provider */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IaaS provider associated with the key */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the key is applicable */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the technical key */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the technical key (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_keys_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_keys_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, resource provisioning) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activity_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., account manager, financial analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage metric */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account the metrics belong to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, storage usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the specific resource (e.g., VM ID, storage bucket ID) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, GB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_metrics_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_info" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle description (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Amount due for the current billing period */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the billing record */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_info_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage report, billing report) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
